mapper.sql: sales_id, sys_user_id, sales_no, sales_name, phone, manager_id, is_manager, status, resign_apply_date, expected_resign_date, actual_resign_date, transition_end_date, commission_rate_default, manager_commission_rate, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_sales ( sales_id, sys_user_id, sales_no, sales_name, phone, manager_id, is_manager, status, resign_apply_date, expected_resign_date, actual_resign_date, transition_end_date, commission_rate_default, manager_commission_rate, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{salesId}, #{sysUserId}, #{salesNo}, #{salesName}, #{phone}, #{managerId}, #{isManager}, #{status}, #{resignApplyDate}, #{expectedResignDate}, #{actualResignDate}, #{transitionEndDate}, #{commissionRateDefault}, #{managerCommissionRate}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_sales WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND status IN ('active','resign_apply','resigned_pending_settle') ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT sales_id FROM jst_sales WHERE (sales_id = #{managerId} OR manager_id = #{managerId}) AND status IN ('active','resign_apply','resigned_pending_settle')
